subcodes.first_line: O thou who turnest thy face towards God! O Beloved of the All-Glorious Beauty, with a countenance radiant as the moon and a visage resplendent as the sun in the assembly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه الی الله دلبر ابهی با رخی چون مه تابان و جمالی چون مهر رخشان در انجمن
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual transformation
